name: cryptotanshinone
summary: Abietane diterpenoid from Salvia miltiorrhiza (Danshen) root with JAK2/STAT3 inhibitory and anti-inflammatory properties. Active constituent in Danshen cardiovascular preparations; limited isolated human data.
description: Abietane diterpenoid from Salvia miltiorrhiza (Danshen) root with JAK2/STAT3 inhibitory and anti-inflammatory properties. Active constituent in Danshen cardiovascular preparations; limited isolated human data.
safetyNotes: Danshen constituents may affect bleeding and cardiovascular medications; use clinician review with anticoagulants/antiplatelets.

claimMap.claim: Use cautious, source-specific language; do not generalize beyond the cited population/preparation.
claimMap.notes: Use cautious, source-specific language; do not generalize beyond the cited population/preparation.

safety: Generally well tolerated for most users.

sources.title: Cryptotanshinone suppresses ovarian cancer via simultaneous inhibition of glycolysis and oxidative phosphorylation.
sources.citation: Author not retrieved (2024). Biomed Pharmacother. PMID: 38039759. DOI: 10.1016/j.biopha.2023.115956.
sources.note: source-backed gap-fill audit only; not a full monograph field extraction

contraindications: Potent competitive inhibitor of CYP1A2 and a moderate mixed-type inhibitor of CYP2C9 so may raise blood levels of drugs cleared by those enzymes such as caffeine or theophylline or warfarin or phenytoin
lowers testosterone and androgen synthesis so avoid in pregnancy or when using androgen-dependent hormone therapy
derived from Salvia miltiorrhiza (danshen) whose extracts carry a well-documented bleeding-risk interaction with anticoagulant or antiplatelet drugs.
